Class Usager

java.lang.Object
models.Usager
public class Usager extends Object
This class represents a user in the database. It contains the user's ID, last name, first name, year of birth, and whether they are eligible for a reduced rate.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Loris

  • Constructor Summary

    Usager(int id, String nom, String prenom, int anneeNaissance, boolean tarifReduit)
    Constructor to create a User object with the specified ID, last name, first name, year of birth, and reduced rate status.

  • Constructor Details

    • Usager

      public Usager(int id, String nom, String prenom, int anneeNaissance, boolean tarifReduit)
      Constructor to create a User object with the specified ID, last name, first name, year of birth, and reduced rate status.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier for the user
      nom - the last name of the user
      prenom - the first name of the user
      anneeNaissance - the year of birth of the user
      tarifReduit - whether the user is eligible for a reduced rate

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Gets the unique identifier of the user.
      Returns:
      the ID of the user

    • getNom

      public String getNom()
      Get the last name of the user.
      Returns:
      the last name of the user

    • setNom

      public void setNom(String nom)
      Set the last name of the user.
      Parameters:
      nom - the last name to set for the user

    • getPrenom

      public String getPrenom()
      Get the first name of the user.
      Returns:
      the first name of the user

    • setPrenom

      public void setPrenom(String prenom)
      Set the first name of the user.
      Parameters:
      prenom - the first name to set for the user

    • getAnneeNaissance

      public int getAnneeNaissance()
      Get the year of birth of the user.
      Returns:
      the year of birth of the user

    • setAnneeNaissance

      public void setAnneeNaissance(int anneeNaissance)
      Set the year of birth of the user.
      Parameters:
      anneeNaissance - the year of birth to set for the user

    • isTarifReduit

      public boolean isTarifReduit()
      Check if the user is eligible for a reduced rate.
      Returns:
      true if the user is eligible for a reduced rate, false otherwise

    • setTarifReduit

      public void setTarifReduit(boolean tarifReduit)
      Set the reduced rate status of the user.
      Parameters:
      tarifReduit - true if the user is eligible for a reduced rate, false otherwise

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the user.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string containing the user's last name, first name, and year of birth
